positive: A geometric celestial map design featuring constellations forming stylized animals and mythological figures, set against a deep midnight blue and cosmic purple nebula backdrop. The main elements should be bold, clean line art using neon glow accents of cyan, electric teal, and vibrant gold leaf texture. Incorporate abstract elements like flowing comet trails, minimal lunar phases, and intersecting astrological symbols. The composition must be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and highly detailed, designed to be visually impactful as an all-over apparel print. Style: Minimalist vector illustration mixed with cosmic psychedelic art. Lighting: Dramatic volumetric glow from the nebula, high contrast, clean outlines. Aspect Ratio: Square.
